title: 驚愕ッ！理事長のサプライズ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm summoned to the director's office
out of the blue. I fear I've made some great
blunder, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out Director Akikawa simply wanted to
offer some words of praise face-to-face!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears highly pleased with everything
<chrname> has accomplished this past
year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While processing these feelings of joy, I once
again resolve to do my best with my partner!
